text:
Unicorn Tribesman Skull (, Ikkaku-zoku no Zugaikotsu) is a skull from the Unicorn Tribe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Background

It is one of the requested items for the Nostrade bodyguard applicants to obtain. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The Unicorn Tribesman Skull is retrieved and delivered by Baise, which allows her to be hired as a bodyguard. 

Trivia

The name of the Unicorn Tribesman Skull is transliterated as The skull of a one horned creature in Crunchyroll's version/translation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 39 (2011) 

References
